name: Big Belly Knight
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>三</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>段</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>腹</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばら</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ナイト
desc: If this card is detached from an Xyz Monster and sent to the Graveyard to activate that monster's effect: You can Special Summon 1 Level 3 or lower monster from your hand.

eff: If this card is detached from an Xyz Monster and sent to the Graveyard to activate that monster's effect: You can Special Summon 1 Level 3 or lower monster from your hand.
